category_sources: Official repository description matches the SAT solver purpose.
source_facts.description says it is a minimalistic and high-performance SAT solver.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README style the project as MiniSat/minisat.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, and the README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/stp/minisat, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists minisat and minisat_core command-line tools.
